scripts.dev: docker compose up -d && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.format:all: npm run format:backend && npm run format:frontend
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.stop: docker compose down && lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill; lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill; lsof -ti :5001 | xargs kill
